calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-04-2009 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings;
Off Calendar Sep-03-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: RESPONDENTS BRAINSTORM CONSULTING INC., DIANE SANDHU, and, MEGAN WATERMAN DILLER Motion for Judgment on the Pleadings. Appearances: Appellant Maritza Gochez, in Pro Per and opposing party appearing; Kerry E. Kennedy, Esq. Attorney at Law, (650) 365-5986 appearing for Respondents and moving party. Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: granted, the Court did not receive opposition. Appeal not timely pursuant to Labor Code section 98.2. Order signed in open Court.(302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797
